faqs.question: Why do I have silverfish in my Queens Village home?
faqs.answer: Silverfish are attracted to moisture and humidity, making Queens Village basements, bathrooms, attics, and crawl spaces ideal habitats. They feed on starches, paper, glue, and fabrics, so they're often found near stored books, cardboard boxes, wallpaper, and clothing. Leaky pipes, poor ventilation, and damp conditions in older Queens Village homes create perfect environments for silverfish to thrive.

faqs.question: How quickly can you eliminate a silverfish infestation in Queens Village?
faqs.answer: Most silverfish infestations in Queens Village can be significantly reduced within 24-48 hours of treatment, with complete elimination typically achieved within 2-3 weeks. We offer same-day and next-day service appointments, and our technicians will identify moisture sources and entry points to prevent future infestations. Follow-up visits are included if needed to ensure your home remains silverfish-free.
